summary: Large decompilation pass for the Toy Figure Pon / tyfigupon menu code. The PR replaced many tyfigupon.h UNK prototypes with typed signatures, implemented a large block of previously stubbed functions in src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c, refined shared toy/list structs and globals, and marked several tyfigupon .data symbols as local in GALE01 symbols. Evidence includes 1360 added lines in tyfigupon.c and header/type updates across toy, tylist, and if/types.

key_files.reason: Main decompilation target; added many includes, local string/data definitions, camera descriptor, helper structs, and implementations for previously stubbed tyfigupon functions.
Converted multiple UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations into typed prototypes such as fn_803152BC(HSD_GObj*), un_803153EC(s32,...), fn_8031638C(s16), and un_803181BC(void).
Refined ToyAnimState layout and documented its size/location; added padding fields and noted an unresolved Toy size assertion.
Changed un_804A2AA8 from a byte array declaration to a typed ToyAnimState global and included ty/types.h.
Updated memzero usage to clear &un_804A2AA8 with sizeof(ToyAnimState) rather than a raw pointer/constant size.
Removed a local duplicate un_804A2AA8_t struct and rewired accesses to the shared ToyAnimState definition.
Corrected un_803087F4 return type from void to HSD_GObj*.
Expanded struct un_804D6EF4_t from mostly padding/x14/x18 fields into explicit fields including HSD_GObj*, jobjs[16], archive, shorts, and s8 state fields.
Changed several tyfigupon-region data symbols from global to local scope.

what_changed: Implemented many tyfigupon functions that were previously header-declared as unknown/stubbed, including fn_803152BC, un_803153EC, fn_803155C8, fn_80315C44, fn_80316170, fn_8031638C, un_80316420, fn_803168DC, tyFigupon_80316BF8, fn_80316C24, un_8031753C, un_80317A60, and un_803181BC.

Added tyfigupon-local resource string literals for ToyFigurePon assets, archive names such as TyMnFigp.dat/TyMnFigp.usd, SdToy.dat/SdToy.usd, SIS data names, error strings, and joint/anim/matanim/shapeanim labels.
Added a static HSD_CameraDescPerspective tyfigupon camera descriptor in tyfigupon.c.
Expanded TyFiguponData from sparse padding to explicit HSD_GObj*, HSD_Text*, state counters, and byte flags.
Added local helper structs TyFiguponUD and TyFiguponED4 in tyfigupon.c for gobj/user-data style state.
Expanded struct un_804D6EF4_t in if/types.h to model fields used by tyfigupon, including x00, unk4, x08, x0C, jobjs[16], archive, x54/x56/x58, pad_5A, and x5C/x5D/x5E.
Replaced local toy.c byte/offset manipulation of un_804A2AA8 with typed ToyAnimState field accesses such as state->jobj[0], state->x0E, state->x0F, state->x10, and state->x11.
Updated tylist reset code from memzero(un_804A2AA8, 0x14) to memzero(&un_804A2AA8, sizeof(ToyAnimState)).
Changed un_803087F4 prototype in toy.h to return HSD_GObj* instead of void.
Changed data symbols un_803FEA10, un_803FEB60, un_803FEED4, and un_803FEEE8 from global to local scope in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
smart_moves: Centralized the un_804A2AA8 layout as ToyAnimState instead of keeping an ad hoc local struct in toy.c and raw u8 array declaration in tylist.h.
Used a jobjs[16] array in un_804D6EF4_t, which made repeated JObj access in tyfigupon code clearer than isolated x14/x18 fields and raw offsets.
Changed memzero to use sizeof(ToyAnimState), reducing the risk of stale hardcoded sizes as the struct layout is refined.
Marked inferred tyfigupon data symbols local in symbols.txt, matching their apparent compilation-unit ownership after moving string/data definitions into tyfigupon.c.
Left explicit matching notes in code, including comments about regswap issues and remaining stackspace, so future permuter/manual work has concrete targets.
Used #pragma dont_inline around un_80314B54, indicating an intentional codegen/matching constraint rather than relying on incidental inlining behavior.
decomp_lessons: When a global byte blob starts appearing in multiple files, promote it to a shared typed struct and update all declarations/usages together.
Prefer array fields for repeated homogeneous members such as JObj slots; this can simplify matching code that indexes through object slots and reduce misleading one-off field names.
Header prototype cleanup is valuable matching work: replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete return/argument types documents calling conventions and enables type propagation.
Use sizeof(struct_type) for clearing/resetting state once a real struct exists; this prevents raw-size mismatches during later layout correction.
Data-symbol scope should be revisited after decompiling a file: local static data in the C file should correspond to local scope in symbols.txt.
Keep comments for known non-100% issues like regswaps, loop initialization mismatches, and stack padding, but avoid claiming the function is fully solved when such comments remain.
When matching animation-heavy menu code, exact struct typing for HSD_JObj, HSD_GObj, HSD_Text, HSD_Archive, and camera/lights/resource references matters as much as the function bodies.
naming_conventions: Retained address-based names for unknown functions: fn_803152BC, fn_803155C8, fn_80315C44, fn_80316170, fn_803168DC, fn_80316C24.
Used tyFigupon_803xxxxx names for functions with module-level tyfigupon identity, such as tyFigupon_80314AA8, tyFigupon_80314BE4, tyFigupon_80314C5C, and tyFigupon_80316BF8.
Used un_803xxxxx / un_804xxxxx names for still-unknown functions and data symbols where semantics were not yet strong enough for descriptive names.
Struct field names remained offset-based, using xNN and pad_NN style names, e.g. x5C, x5D, x5E, pad_5A, pad_12.
Resource string statics used descriptive str_* names such as str_panel_joint, str_archive_jp, str_archive_us, str_coin_animjoint, and str_scene_lights.
Shared state struct name ToyAnimState was used instead of file-local un_804A2AA8_t, indicating a preference for semantic type names once usage is understood.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used #pragma dont_inline on/reset around un_80314B54 to control inlining for matching.
Inserted PAD_STACK calls in tyfigupon functions, including PAD_STACK(40) and PAD_STACK(16), as explicit stack-shape matching aids.

Code comments document remaining register-allocation problems: a 3-way regswap r29-r30-r31 in tyFigupon_80314C5C, a TODO for one more regswap in fn_803155C8, and another note about removing 0x8 stackspace plus fixing a regswap.
Refactored absolute-value float calculations to use ABS(...) in tyFigupon_80314C5C, likely to better match generated control flow and reduce manual branch structure.
Changed decrement style in tyFigupon_80314C5C from pre-decrement comparison to post-decrement comparison, affecting emitted code shape.
Used typed field accesses and occasional casts back to u8* for dynamic offset stores where necessary, preserving match flexibility while improving struct clarity.

review_feedback.feedback: The PR body only says "Tracking PR as usual"; it does not provide detailed rationale.

Author left an image and wrote "Leaving it here for someone who has more patience with permuter than me :)". This suggests some remaining permuter/matching work, but the exact function or mismatch is not identifiable from the text excerpt alone.
No formal review comments were present in the provided slice.
Inline TODOs identify unresolved matching details: regswaps, loop initialization being off, 0x8 stackspace, and a Toy struct size note.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c comments for regswap, stackspace, or loop initialization TODOs.
Search for later renames of TyFiguponData, TyFiguponUD, TyFiguponED4, un_804D6EF0, and un_804D6EF4.
Check whether ToyAnimState size/layout was later finalized and whether the Toy size TODO/static assert was resolved.
Search PRs that continue matching fn_803155C8, fn_80315C44, fn_80316170, or fn_80316C24.
Verify whether the tyfigupon data symbols changed to local here remained local in later symbols.txt updates.
